title: Send+Sync compile-time assertion on CompiledScript is correct
description: WHY THIS IS CORRECT AND SHOULD BE DEFENDED: The const block asserting Send+Sync on CompiledScript catches any future addition of a non-Send/Sync field (e.g. Rc, RefCell) at compile time rather than at the caller's first attempt to send across threads. Arc<HashMap<String, fancy_regex::Regex>> is Send+Sync because fancy_regex::Regex is Send+Sync. The assertion is the right pattern for a public type that will be stored in Arc by callers.
